speaker: speaker1
text: Boy , it looks like everyone in your family is here , from young to old .

speaker: speaker2
text: Easter's a good day for reunions . The family goes to church together .

speaker: speaker1
text: And after church they come here for lunch ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yup , a big potluck buffet . And then-notice there are no children around ?

speaker: speaker2
text: The kids wait in the house while the grownups hide these . Hide away , Yi-jun !
